title: Add compare-backed delta summary to proposal apply preview
summary: Extend proposal apply preview with a current delta summary that compares proposal expectations against the live native snapshot compare surface, so the diff plan is no longer metadata-only.
acceptance_criteria: Proposal apply preview exposes a current delta summary derived from the native snapshot compare layer.
The delta summary highlights truthful gaps such as missing snapshots, weaker-than-expected coverage, or evidence/source mismatches.
The surface stays read-only and avoids claiming an exact repository diff when only current native truth is available.
Ticket validation, patch hygiene, repo contract validation, and a targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build pass for the slice.

evidence.note: Proposal apply preview now shows a current delta summary with posture, aligned signals, and current gaps derived from the native snapshot compare layer.
The existing diff plan now folds in compare-backed aligned signals and gaps, so apply preview is no longer limited to proposal metadata alone.
Confirmed patch hygiene and whitespace correctness.
Repo contract still passes after the compare-backed delta slice.

evidence.path: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build

trigger.source_ref: Top 10 item 1 after HS-0026: connect diff-oriented apply preview to concrete inspector snapshot comparison instead of a metadata-only plan.

commands: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
agent_notes: Prefer deriving deltas from current native scope truth rather than inventing repository patch details.
Keep the new compare-backed summary local to proposal apply preview unless another surface needs the same abstraction.
